summary: Staff Auth Separation Testing Complete - All 21 tests passed. Staff authentication is now fully separated from admin authentication. Staff uses konekt_staff_token, admin uses konekt_admin_token. Cross-role isolation verified.

issues: Settings button appears in header AND sidebar may show 2 settings-related links - minor, not a duplicate in sidebar itself

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Staff/Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Auth Separation is complete and verified. Key points: 1) Staff login at /staff-login uses StaffAuthContext which stores konekt_staff_token. 2) Admin login at /login uses AdminAuthContext which stores konekt_admin_token. 3) StaffLoginPage rejects admin role accounts with clear error toast. 4) StaffLayout has dedicated sidebar (Dashboard, Orders, Customers, Promotions, Earnings) and breadcrumb shows 'Sales > ...' not 'Admin > ...'. 5) Cross-role isolation works: /staff without staff token redirects to /staff-login, staff token cannot access /admin routes.

staff_login_rejection.test: Admin account trying to login via StaffLoginPage
staff_login_rejection.evidence: Shows error toast 'This login is for staff accounts only. Admin accounts should use the admin portal.' and stays on /staff-login

staff_layout_sidebar.test: StaffLayout sidebar contains Dashboard, Orders, Customers, Promotions, Earnings
staff_layout_sidebar.evidence: All 5 nav items found with correct data-testid attributes

staff_layout_user_info.test: User info shows staff name + Sales role badge

admin_auth_isolation.test: Admin login at /login shows AdminLayout (NOT StaffLayout)
admin_auth_isolation.evidence: No StaffLayout detected, Admin Control Center displayed

admin_sidebar_settings.test: Admin sidebar has Settings entry at /admin/settings-hub

partner_separation.test: Distributor partner sees product partner nav only, NOT affiliate nav
partner_separation.evidence: Found Dashboard, My Catalog, Stock Table, Bulk Upload, My Orders, Settlements - no affiliate items

customer_referrals.evidence: ReferralsPage loads with referral code DEMO.CUSE6CF, referral link, stats

cross_role_isolation_no_token.test: Navigating to /staff without staff token redirects to /staff-login

cross_role_isolation_staff_admin.test: Staff token should NOT work for /admin routes
cross_role_isolation_staff_admin.evidence: Staff token cannot access /admin - redirected to /login
